client.name: Narmina Ibrahimova
client.label: Product control and financial reporting professional

core_positioning.notes: Best fit is Product Controller, P&L Controller, finance control, financial reporting, reconciliation, and close-cycle roles in multinational banking, shared-services, and finance operations environments. Strongest value comes from P&L production, balance-sheet substantiation, month-end and quarter-end support, cross-functional issue resolution, and disciplined reporting accuracy. Avoid overselling advanced automation, SQL/Python-heavy analytics, or senior risk/regulatory ownership until further evidence exists.

summary_base: Product control and financial reporting professional with nearly 3 years of experience across P&L production, balance sheet substantiation, General Ledger management, reconciliation, and month-end close in Global Markets environments at HSBC.

Strongest evidence includes identifying a cross-system FX rate error during quarter-end that prevented incorrect P&L reporting across EMEA, supporting daily P&L across 3 trading desks, and stepping into critical GL posting coverage during month-end close.

Best positioned for Product Controller, Financial Control, Financial Reporting, reconciliation, and finance operations roles where analytical precision, control discipline, and reliable execution matter.

experience.summary: Current product control role covering daily P&L monitoring, month-end support, issue investigation, and cross-functional reporting coordination across Global Markets trading desks.
highlights: **Monitored daily P&L across 3 Global Markets trading desks** and verified attribution across market movements, new trades, and valuation components in coordination with Front Office teams.
**Identified a cross-system FX rate error during quarter-end** and prepared corrective follow-up actions that prevented incorrect P&L reporting across EMEA business desks.
**Protected month-end GL posting continuity** as the only team member with access to a newly launched system, uploading journals for Product Control business desks during the close window.
**Mentored and trained 4 team members** and created process instruction documents for newly implemented procedures.
**Resolved a portfolio discrepancy during month-end Trueup** by tracing the hierarchy issue, recalculating portfolio-level P&L, and clearing the gap before close.

experience.summary: End-to-end P&L production and control role supporting assigned Global Markets trading desks across daily, intramonth, and month-end cycles.
highlights: **Delivered end-to-end daily P&L production** for assigned trading desks, reviewing new trades, market environment, carry, and cancel/amend adjustments.
**Performed balance sheet and OBS substantiation** in line with HSBC accounting policies and internal control requirements.
**Coordinated with Front Office, Valuation Control, and Accounting Control** to resolve pricing and booking discrepancies and prepare variance commentary for senior review.

experience.summary: Internship supporting daily and monthly product-control reporting, reconciliation, and balance-sheet validation tasks within Global Markets Finance.
highlights: **Prepared daily and monthly P&L reconciliation reports** and balance-sheet validation outputs against Global Markets Finance standards.
**Maintained data accuracy across assigned portfolios** through structured reporting and validation support.
**Contributed to reporting-process improvement efforts** and manual-reporting automation support; exact scope should be verified before stronger wording is used.

education.institution: Azerbaijan State Oil and Industry University
